title: Dekton 115pc Precision Tool Kit - 98 Screwdriver Bits| 17 Disassembly Accessories Handle, Flexible Extension Shaft, Extension Bar, Tweezers, Plastic Pry Tools Many More| Durable Tools for Precision
features: Comprehensive 115-Piece Set: Tool Kit includes an extensive range of tools designed to meet all your precision repair needs. This versatile kit features 98 screwdriver bits, along with 17 additional disassembly accessories, offering a comprehensive solution for a wide array of tasks, from electronics repair to small appliance maintenance.

98 Screwdriver Bits for Various Applications: With 98 high-quality screwdriver bits in various sizes and types, this kit provides the flexibility to handle virtually any screw or fastener. The bits are designed for precision and durability, ensuring that you can tackle different projects with confidence

Flexible Extension Shaft and Extension Bar: The flexible extension shaft and extension bar included in the kit offer added versatility for reaching screws and fasteners in hard-to-access areas. These tools enable you to work around obstructions and apply the necessary torque with precision, enhancing your overall repair and assembly capabilities.

Durable and Reliable Tools: Crafted from high-quality materials, the tools in this kit are built to last. The durability of each component ensures long-term reliability and consistent performance, even under demanding conditions. The precision-machined bits and sturdy handles provide a secure grip and effective torque application.

Organized Storage for Easy Access: The Dekton Precision Tool Kit comes with a well-organized case that keeps all tools neatly arranged and easily accessible. The compact design ensures that the kit is portable and convenient to store, making it an excellent choice for both professional technicians who need a reliable toolset for various tasks.
description: The Dekton 115pc Precision Tool Kit is the ultimate solution for tackling a wide range of precision tasks with efficiency and ease. This comprehensive set includes 98 high-quality screwdriver bits, designed to meet the demands of various applications, from electronics and gadgets to household repairs. Each bit is meticulously crafted to ensure a precise fit and exceptional durability, making them ideal for working on delicate and intricate projects. In addition to the extensive selection of screwdriver bits, the kit features 17 essential disassembly accessories that enhance its versatility. Among these are a flexible extension shaft and an extension bar, both of which provide added reach and flexibility, allowing you to access hard-to-reach areas with ease. The set also includes a variety of plastic pry tools, tweezers, and a robust handle, all of which are designed to assist in safely and efficiently disassembling and reassembling components. The ergonomic handle offers a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue and providing greater control during precision work. The flexible extension shaft and extension bar add versatility, enabling you to work in confined spaces and tackle complex projects with confidence. It combines a wide array of tools and accessories in one convenient package, making it easier than ever to achieve high-quality results. Each component of the kit is designed to meet Amazon’s rigorous standards for quality and performance, ensuring that you receive a product that not only meets but exceeds your expectations.
